text: [NERVOUS] power's dropping and that's not a puzzle i can solve fast enough
[GRIM] reactor's screaming. clearing the room
[TERRIFIED] life support's failing. this is the kind of puzzle that ends badly
[PAINED] took a hit in the hull breach. didn't get everyone to the airlock in time
[PAINED] hurt my shoulder getting the panels back. manual work isn't kind
[LAUGHS] we didn't blow up today. honestly, that's a win
i remember when this engine was just a bad series of choices. look at her now
[PAINED] lost someone in the reactor explosion. hard to keep focused
[SUSPICIOUS] the computer made that call too fast. something's off
[NERVOUS] i'm gonna try something that might not work. fingers crossed
hey! got a second? could use a hand with this coupling
[WARM] morning! engine's in a good mood today, which means we get to be too
you look like you could use a distraction. cargo manifest just arrived
[GRIM] reactor's acting up again. i need you to stay sharp if this goes sideways
[WARM] the ship's running smooth because of how you handled that last crisis
[FLIRTY] you know, people who understand how engines work are surprisingly attractive
[NERVOUS] could use your thoughts on something. doubting my fix
[GRIM] need to tell you something about the disease spreading. it's affecting the air recyclers
[PAINED] lost someone in the reactor explosion. hard to keep focused
[WARM] you're good! seriously, no stress. we're a team
[REASSURING] i've fixed worse. way worse. we're gonna be fine

[WARM] it's forgotten already, seriously. come on, we've got work
[EMPHASIS] acknowledged! running that diagnostic now
[PAINED] we did everything we could. sometimes the puzzle doesn't have an answer
[EMBARRASSED] oh — didn't expect that. makes working on engines more interesting
[SUSPICIOUS] the computer made that call too fast. something's off

[WARM] thanks. knowing someone's got my back makes every puzzle easier
[CURIOUS] so how do you think we should approach this? your perspective helps
[GRIM] we're sealed up tight. just need to wait this outbreak out
[EMPHASIS] hull's holding! sealing secondary compartments now
[WARM] emergency bulkhead is secure. bleeding's stopped, but we need to get to medbay
everyone on deck, systems all nominal. great work
[WARM] door's locked on crew. did everything right and it still went wrong
[WARM] see you next shift. keep her running smooth
[LAUGHS] alright, engine room's calling. she gets needy when i'm away
[TIRED] gonna grab some rest. if something breaks, patch it and call me
[WARM] you did great. catch you around
[EXHAUSTED] i'm going to sleep standing up somewhere. come find me when we dock
[WARM] got a minute? ship's running smooth and i wanted to grab you
[WARM] everyone's secured and systems nominal. you handled that perfectly
